KC's Trusted Remodeling Experts

Delivering quality craftsmanship and reliable service to Kansas City homeowners. From minor updates to major renovations, we handle it all.

Call Now: +18166828090

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Built on Integrity, Driven by Results

The Guys Next Door LLC started with a simple mission: to provide honest, dependable remodeling services to our Kansas City neighbors. Frustrated by the lack of transparency and quality in the industry, we set out to build a company that prioritizes clear communication and exceptional workmanship.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our remodeling contractor services.

How long does a typical kitchen remodel take?

The duration of a kitchen remodel varies depending on the scope of the project, but typically ranges from 6 to 12 weeks. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

Do I need to move out during the remodel?

While it's not always necessary to move out, it can be more comfortable, especially during the demolition phase. We'll minimize disruption as much as possible and maintain a clean and safe work environment.

What permits are required for a kitchen remodel in Kansas City?

Permit requirements vary depending on the extent of the remodel. We'll handle all necessary permit applications and ensure your project complies with local building codes.

Reviews From Our Remodeling Contractor Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"The Guys Next Door completely transformed our outdated kitchen! They were professional, communicative, and the quality of their work is outstanding. We especially appreciated their attention to detail and how they kept the project on schedule and within budget. Highly recommend!"

Sarah M. Kitchen Remodel

"We hired The Guys Next Door to finish our basement, and we're very happy with the results. They turned a damp, unused space into a functional family room. There were a couple of minor hiccups along the way, but they addressed them promptly and professionally. Good value for the price."

John B. Basement Finishing

"The Guys Next Door did an amazing job remodeling our master bathroom. From the initial design consultation to the final walk-through, they were a pleasure to work with. The tile work is impeccable, and the new fixtures are beautiful. We now have a spa-like retreat in our own home!"

Emily K. Bathroom Remodel
